tasks.instruction: Choose the correct answer A, B or C.

items.stem: If I _________ fly, I would visit every country in the world.
If my cat _________ talk, it would ask for food all day long.
If I were a superhero, I _________ save people from danger.
If she _________ a dragon, she would fly over the mountains.
I would live in a castle if I _________ a king.
If we _________ invisible, we would sneak into the zoo at night.
